data.body: WS-C STORY COMPLETE + committed (C1-C4, last 9f-ish). Executor spine done: event types, thin executor+tripwire, idempotency/capture/TTL, lib/CLI/MCP-async entrypoints. Unblocks WS-E + ffc4. Note: E1 (registry+interface) already shipped inside executor.py (STEP_REGISTRY/register_step/StepContext/StepResult + marker idempotency). Next: WS-E2 built-in scripted steps (steps.py: fetch_ticket/commits/epic_graph, render_context, gate(unsecured/versioned policy), comment_verdict, tag, set_fields) — side-effecting ones idempotent via (run_id,step_id) marker.
